questions.question: I ___ my room yesterday. (clean)
She ___ a delicious cake last Sunday. (make)
They ___ to the beach last summer. (go)
We ___ football two days ago. (play)
He ___ breakfast at 7:00 yesterday. (eat)
My brother ___ his keys yesterday. (find)
I ___ my friend a birthday present last week. (give)
She ___ five glasses of water after PE. (drink)
Tom ___ home very late last night. (come)
He ___ many photos on holiday. (take)
___ you watch TV yesterday?
She ___ not go to school yesterday.
They ___ their homework last night.
I ___ a funny film last weekend. (see)
We ___ to music yesterday evening. (listen)
She ___ her homework before dinner. (finish)
Which sentence is in the Past Simple?
options: I visit my grandma every Sunday.

questions.question: Which time expression is usually used with the Past Simple?
She ___ in London in 2022. (live)
We ___ to the zoo three weeks ago. (drive)
